news.title:
Canara Bank disclosed under SEBI regulations that its promoter, the President of India, holds 62.93% stake as of March 31, 2026.
The promoter and Persons Acting in Concert made no encumbrance on shares during FY 2025-26.
news.summary:
Canara Bank disclosed under SEBI regulations that its promoter, the President of India, holds 62.93% stake as of March 31, 2026.
The promoter and Persons Acting in Concert made no encumbrance on shares during FY 2025-26.

news.title:
Analysts on NDTV Profit's 'Ask Profit' suggest holding Coforge, selling Bharat Dynamics, and holding Canara Bank with specific levels.
Power Finance Corp. is in consolidation with a positive long-term view; rapid-fire tips include selling Paras Defence and adding ITC Hotels.
news.summary:
Analysts on NDTV Profit's 'Ask Profit' suggest holding Coforge, selling Bharat Dynamics, and holding Canara Bank with specific levels.
Power Finance Corp. is in consolidation with a positive long-term view; rapid-fire tips include selling Paras Defence and adding ITC Hotels.

news.title:
Analysts recommend Buy on L&T at Rs 3,588 and RIL near Rs 1,270-1,300; Hold for Canara Bank, MRPL, Piramal Pharma.
Avoid Shakti Pumps; Tata Motors, Vimta Labs advised as Wait and Watch; HBL Engineering Buy on declines; ITC Sell on rise.
news.summary:
Analysts recommend Buy on L&T at Rs 3,588 and RIL near Rs 1,270-1,300; Hold for Canara Bank, MRPL, Piramal Pharma.
Avoid Shakti Pumps; Tata Motors, Vimta Labs advised as Wait and Watch; HBL Engineering Buy on declines; ITC Sell on rise.

news.title:
PSU banks, including Canara Bank, UCO Bank, and SBI, fell up to 5% due to rising bond yields reaching 6.9%.
The Nifty PSU Bank index dropped 3.6%, with 7 stocks declining 10-21% in 2026, led by Punjab & Sind Bank (-21%).
news.summary:
PSU banks, including Canara Bank, UCO Bank, and SBI, fell up to 5% due to rising bond yields reaching 6.9%.
The Nifty PSU Bank index dropped 3.6%, with 7 stocks declining 10-21% in 2026, led by Punjab & Sind Bank (-21%).

news.title:
Canara Bank may rebound to ₹158, with upside potential of 20.6%, says Choice Broking.
Stock holds above 200 DEMA; key support at ₹125, break below may weaken momentum.
news.summary:
Canara Bank may rebound to ₹158, with upside potential of 20.6%, says Choice Broking.
Stock holds above 200 DEMA; key support at ₹125, break below may weaken momentum.

news.title:
Canara Bank's valuation shifted from attractive to fair due to market dynamics.
Analysis covers P/E and P/BV ratios versus historical averages and peers.
news.summary:
Canara Bank's valuation shifted from attractive to fair due to market dynamics.
Analysis covers P/E and P/BV ratios versus historical averages and peers.

news.title:
Kotak Securities' Amol Athawale recommends Vedanta, Crompton Greaves, and Canara Bank for short-term gains with specific targets and stop losses.
Vedanta targets ₹720, Crompton ₹260, and Canara Bank ₹147, supported by technical patterns and bullish momentum signals.

news.title:
Canara Bank sees a surge in open interest, indicating higher market participation.
Recent price gains, rising volumes, and improved ratings signal growing investor confidence.
news.summary:
Canara Bank sees a surge in open interest, indicating higher market participation.
Recent price gains, rising volumes, and improved ratings signal growing investor confidence.

news.title:
Canara Bank rose 3.6% to Rs 134.25, outperforming peers by 1.8%.
It surpassed the Sensex's 2.1% gain, showing stock-specific strength.
news.summary:
Canara Bank rose 3.6% to Rs 134.25, outperforming peers by 1.8%.

news.title:
PSU bank stocks, including SBI and Canara Bank, rose up to 5% amid stock market rebound.
Nifty PSU Bank index gained 3.8% intraday, driven by easing crude prices and broader market optimism.
news.summary:
PSU bank stocks, including SBI and Canara Bank, rose up to 5% amid stock market rebound.
Nifty PSU Bank index gained 3.8% intraday, driven by easing crude prices and broader market optimism.

news.title:
West Asia tensions wiped ₹6T from PSU stocks' market cap; Nifty 50 fell 8%, crude crossed $100/barrel.
PSU bank, oil stocks led declines; BPCL fell 22%, Canara Bank down 13-15%; fundamentals remain stable.
news.summary:
West Asia tensions wiped ₹6T from PSU stocks' market cap; Nifty 50 fell 8%, crude crossed $100/barrel.
PSU bank, oil stocks led declines; BPCL fell 22%, Canara Bank down 13-15%; fundamentals remain stable.

news.title:
EOW files FIR against Canara Bank officials and others over Rs 33 lakh loan fraud.
Fraud involved forged property documents; property valuer also implicated.
news.summary:
EOW files FIR against Canara Bank officials and others over Rs 33 lakh loan fraud.
Fraud involved forged property documents; property valuer also implicated.

news.title:
Canara Bank hikes long-tenor MCLR, raising borrowing costs for linked loans.
Customers with long-tenor loans may face higher EMIs due to revised rates.
news.summary:
Canara Bank hikes long-tenor MCLR, raising borrowing costs for linked loans.
Customers with long-tenor loans may face higher EMIs due to revised rates.

news.title:
ICRA reaffirmed Canara Bank's ratings: Basel III Tier II Bonds (AAA Stable), Tier I Bonds (AA Stable), Certificate of Deposit (A1).
Ratings reflect Canara's sovereign ownership, strong profitability, robust deposit franchise, and improved asset quality.
news.summary:
ICRA reaffirmed Canara Bank's ratings: Basel III Tier II Bonds (AAA Stable), Tier I Bonds (AA Stable), Certificate of Deposit (A1).
Ratings reflect Canara's sovereign ownership, strong profitability, robust deposit franchise, and improved asset quality.

news.title:
Canara Bank sees 13.3% rise in open interest, indicating increased market activity.
Despite a 0.6% price dip on Feb 26, strong volumes reflect mixed trader sentiments.
news.summary:
Canara Bank sees 13.3% rise in open interest, indicating increased market activity.
Despite a 0.6% price dip on Feb 26, strong volumes reflect mixed trader sentiments.

news.title:
Govt to pilot CBDC-based food subsidy under PMGKAY in Puducherry.
Launch scheduled for 26 February, marking a shift in subsidy delivery.
news.summary:
Govt to pilot CBDC-based food subsidy under PMGKAY in Puducherry.
Launch scheduled for 26 February, marking a shift in subsidy delivery.

news.title:
Canara Bank plans to raise ₹5,000 crore via Tier 2 bonds on Feb 26, 2026, to boost capital and business growth.
The issue includes a ₹2,000 crore base size and ₹3,000 crore green shoe option to meet investor demand.
news.summary:
Canara Bank plans to raise ₹5,000 crore via Tier 2 bonds on Feb 26, 2026, to boost capital and business growth.
The issue includes a ₹2,000 crore base size and ₹3,000 crore green shoe option to meet investor demand.

news.title:
PSBs surpass private banks as quarterly profits reach new highs.
Only 3 of 30 listed universal banks had >1% net NPAs in Q3.
news.summary:
PSBs surpass private banks as quarterly profits reach new highs.
Only 3 of 30 listed universal banks had >1% net NPAs in Q3.

news.title:
Canara Bank surged 3.2% on 20 Feb 2026, hitting 154.25 intraday.
The stock outperformed Sensex's 0.7% gain, showcasing strong PSU banking performance.
news.summary:
Canara Bank surged 3.2% on 20 Feb 2026, hitting 154.25 intraday.
The stock outperformed Sensex's 0.7% gain, showcasing strong PSU banking performance.

news.title:
Foreign investors increase stakes in PSU banks despite $19B outflows in 2025, attracted by low valuations and rising profits.
Banks like Bank of Maharashtra, Union Bank, and Canara Bank hit FPI ownership highs, with PSU Bank index rallying 60% over the year.
news.summary:
Foreign investors increase stakes in PSU banks despite $19B outflows in 2025, attracted by low valuations and rising profits.
Banks like Bank of Maharashtra, Union Bank, and Canara Bank hit FPI ownership highs, with PSU Bank index rallying 60% over the year.
